rare_exact_pair.name: Rare Exact Pair
rare_exact_pair.rankingRule: All members tie for gameplay rank; actual probabilities may still be displayed.

hands.name: Echo Pair
hands.description: The same person is represented in two contributing slots.

hands.ruleSummary: The same person is represented in two contributing slots.

hands.shortDescription: Two different people are each represented twice.
hands.ruleSummary: Two different people are each represented twice.

hands.description: One person is represented three times and another person twice.

hands.ruleSummary: One person is represented three times and another person twice.

notes: The selected game format and virtual-self setting determine whether this level is possible.

hands.shortDescription: Two contributing slots represent both members of any recognized couple.
hands.ruleSummary: Two contributing slots represent both members of any recognized couple.

hands.description: Happy and Light are represented in two separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Happy and Light are represented in two separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Happy and Light are represented in two separate slots.

hands.description: Dopey, Doc, and Bashful are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Dopey, Doc, and Bashful are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Dopey, Doc, and Bashful are represented in separate slots.

hands.description: 3 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: 3 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: 3 different sisters are represented in separate slots.

hands.description: 4 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: 4 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: 4 different sisters are represented in separate slots.

hands.description: 5 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: 5 different sisters are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: 5 different sisters are represented in separate slots.

hands.description: Cube, Ball, and Net are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Cube, Ball, and Net are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Cube, Ball, and Net are represented in separate slots.

hands.name: Three at the Grill
hands.description: Sleepy, Steak, and one child are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Sleepy, Steak, and one child are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Sleepy, Steak, and one child are represented in separate slots.

hands.name: Four at the Grill
hands.description: Sleepy, Steak, and two children are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Sleepy, Steak, and two children are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Sleepy, Steak, and two children are represented in separate slots.

hands.name: Five at the Grill
hands.description: Sleepy, Steak, and all three children are represented in separate slots.
hands.shortDescription: Sleepy, Steak, and all three children are represented in separate slots.
hands.ruleSummary: Sleepy, Steak, and all three children are represented in separate slots.

hands.name: Jersey Pair
hands.description: The exact J♠ Steak card and A♠ Ball card appear together.
hands.shortDescription: The exact J♠ Steak card and A♠ Ball card appear together.
hands.ruleSummary: The exact J♠ Steak card and A♠ Ball card appear together.

hands.name: Dancers
hands.description: A fixed pair of two specific physical cards appears together.
hands.shortDescription: A fixed pair of two specific physical cards appears together.
hands.ruleSummary: A fixed pair of two specific physical cards appears together.
notes: The actual card IDs are intentionally not stored because only the exact pair probability is needed.

hands.name: Family Album
hands.description: The exact 7♠ and 10♠ household portraits appear together.
hands.shortDescription: The exact 7♠ and 10♠ household portraits appear together.
hands.ruleSummary: The exact 7♠ and 10♠ household portraits appear together.

hands.name: Grandparents Album
hands.description: The exact Q♠ and K♠ grandparent portraits appear together.
hands.shortDescription: The exact Q♠ and K♠ grandparent portraits appear together.
hands.ruleSummary: The exact Q♠ and K♠ grandparent portraits appear together.

hands.name: Fun Flight
hands.description: The exact 9♠ Fly portrait appears with K♠ or Kick’s Joker.
hands.shortDescription: The exact 9♠ Fly portrait appears with K♠ or Kick’s Joker.
hands.ruleSummary: The exact 9♠ Fly portrait appears with K♠ or Kick’s Joker.

requirements.notes: Its true probability may differ by Joker setting, but its gameplay rank is tied to the other rare exact pairs.

hands.name: Full Ancestry
hands.description: Crown♠, Q♠, K♠, and one wedding Spade appear together.
hands.shortDescription: Crown♠, Q♠, K♠, and one wedding Spade appear together.
hands.ruleSummary: Crown♠, Q♠, K♠, and one wedding Spade appear together.

hands.name: Grandparent and Ace
hands.description: A grandparent is represented with one of the four Ace children.
hands.shortDescription: A grandparent together with one of the four Ace children.
hands.ruleSummary: Separate slots represent any grandparent and Light, Cube, Ball, or Net. Virtual self may fill the child slot when applicable.

hands.name: Heritage
hands.description: A parent appears with that parent’s grandparent portrait.
hands.shortDescription: A parent appears with that parent’s grandparent portrait.
hands.ruleSummary: Queen plus Q♠, or King plus K♠, using separate slots. Crown♠ may represent one parent, and virtual self may fill the matching parent slot.

hands.name: Double Heritage
hands.description: Both parents appear with both grandparent portraits.
hands.shortDescription: Both parents appear with both grandparent portraits.
hands.ruleSummary: Separate slots represent Queen and King with the exact Q♠ and K♠ cards. Crown♠ may fill only one parent slot, and virtual self may fill one matching parent slot.

hands.name: Brother Time
hands.description: Five contributing slots can each be assigned as a brother.
hands.shortDescription: Five contributing slots all represent brothers.
hands.ruleSummary: Each slot represents Dopey, Doc, or Bashful. An 8 may fill one brother slot, and virtual self supplies one slot when the player is a brother.

hands.name: Sister Time
hands.description: Five contributing slots can each be assigned as a sister.
hands.shortDescription: Five contributing slots all represent sisters.
hands.ruleSummary: Each slot represents Snow White, Grumpy, Sneezy, Happy, or Sleepy. An 8 may fill one sister slot, and virtual self supplies one slot when the player is a sister.

hands.name: Dynamic Duo
hands.description: One of the paired sibling-rank combinations is completed, with one 8 allowed as a substitute.
hands.shortDescription: A paired sibling-rank combination, with one 8 allowed as a substitute.
hands.ruleSummary: Qualifying pairs are 2+3, 4+5, 6+7, or 9+10. One 8 or virtual self may replace one matching person slot; two 8s alone do not qualify.

hands.name: Family Sleepover
hands.description: One Ace child appears with a non-parent married couple or with Queen and King as both grandparents.
hands.shortDescription: An Ace child stays with a non-parent couple or with both grandparents.
hands.ruleSummary: A child appears with a married couple who are not that child’s parents, through their wedding portrait or separate spouse slots; Queen and King may instead serve as both grandparents. Virtual self may fill one person slot.

hands.name: Same-Suit Relationship Pair
hands.description: An approved relationship pair appears in one common suit.
hands.shortDescription: An approved relationship pair appears in one common suit.
hands.ruleSummary: Qualifying subtypes include two brothers, two sisters, a married couple, or a direct parent and child in the same suit. Virtual self cannot help because it has no suit.

hands.name: Players Represented
hands.description: Runtime-generated hands based on the selected number of players and game format.
hands.shortDescription: Runtime-generated hands based on the selected number of players and game format.
hands.ruleSummary: Runtime-generated hands based on the selected number of players and game format.
notes: Virtual self may upgrade a hand during play, but generated probability rankings use physical cards only.
